title: FuelCell Energy Q3 2023 Earnings Preview
text: FuelCell Energy Q3 2023 earnings preview from Seeking Alpha. Consensus EPS estimate for Q3 2023 was $(0.08), flat YoY. Consensus revenue estimate was $28.5 million, down 33.9% YoY. Historically, FCEL beat EPS estimates 25% of time and beaten revenue estimates 75% of time. Preview anticipated continued challenges in product sales but expected strength in generation and service segments. The preview highlighted company's focus on backlog conversion and advancing solid oxide technology platform. Key metrics tracked: gross profit/loss trend, operating expense management, cash position, backlog growth. Guidance focus on whether company could achieve positive gross margins and sustainable revenue growth. Q3 2023 preview noted challenging market environment with reduced customer capex spending affecting near-term results but longer-term opportunity in hydrogen and fuel cell technology. Management expected to provide updated guidance on backlog conversion timeline and timeline for achieving profitability milestones.
